originalTitle: Persona 6 exists, and that’s all we know
summary: This year's Summer Game Fest turned out to be a good one for fans of Japanese RPGs. First, the conclusion of the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy was announced at SGF Live, and now we have the long-awaited return of the Persona series. Atlus confirmed Persona 6 exists with a brief teaser, but aside from […]
content: This year’s Summer Game Fest turned out to be a good one for fans of Japanese RPGs. First, the conclusion of the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy was announced at SGF Live, and now we have the long-awaited return of the Persona series. Atlus confirmed Persona 6 exists with a brief teaser, but aside from implying a very dark tone, that’s about all the video revealed. There’s no release date or window, though the game will be coming to the PS5, Xbox, and PC whenever it does launch. Atlus describes the game as “a bold, new standalone story blending heartfelt daily life and new characters with pulse-pounding, supernatural adventure,” which could also describe most Persona titles. Persona 6 will be the first all-new entry in the franchise since 2017. However, Atlus hasn’t exactly been dormant during that time. An enhanced version, Persona 5 Royal, launched in 2022, and the developer also put out a remake of Persona 3. Meanwhile, longtime Persona director Katsura Hashino led development on a different roleplaying game, the fantasy epic Metaphor: ReFantazio in 2024. In addition to Persona 6, Atlus also announced that Persona 4 Revival is launching on February 18th. [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1osdiOAkBKc]
chineseTitle: 《女神异闻录 6》已经存在，这就是我们所知道的一切
chineseSummary: 今年的夏季游戏节对于日本角色扮演游戏的粉丝来说是一个很好的盛会。首先，《最终幻想 7》重制版三部曲的结局在 SGF Live 上宣布，现在我们迎来了期待已久的《女神异闻录》系列的回归。 Atlus 通过一个简短的预告片证实了《女神异闻录 6》的存在，但除了 […]
chineseContent: 今年的夏季游戏节对于日本角色扮演游戏的粉丝来说是一个很好的盛会。首先，《最终幻想 7》重制版三部曲的结局在 SGF Live 上宣布，现在我们迎来了期待已久的《女神异闻录》系列的回归。 Atlus 通过一个简短的预告片证实了《女神异闻录 6》的存在，但除了暗示非常黑暗的基调之外，这就是视频中透露的全部内容。目前还没有发布日期或窗口，但游戏一旦发布就会登陆 PS5、Xbox 和 PC。 Atlus 将这款游戏描述为“一个大胆的、全新的独立故事，将真挚的日常生活和新角色与令人心跳加速的超自然冒险融为一体”，这也可以用来形容大多数《女神异闻录》游戏。 《女神异闻录 6》将是该系列自 2017 年以来的第一款全新作品。然而，Atlus 在此期间并没有完全休眠。增强版《女神异闻录 5 Royal》于 2022 年推出，开发商还推出了《女神异闻录 3》的重制版。同时，长期担任《女神异闻录》总监的桥野桂在 2024 年领导了另一款角色扮演游戏的开发，即奇幻史诗《隐喻：ReFantazio》。除了《女神异闻录 6》之外，Atlus 还宣布《女神异闻录 4：复兴版》将于 2 月 18 日推出。 [媒体：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1osdiOAkBKc]
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
